title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at DMart

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at DMart
jsonLd.description:
DMart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DMart:
DMart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DMart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
